items.title: NVIDIA Vera Rubin Maximizes Intelligence per Dollar for Post-Training Workloads — a Key Metric for Agentic AI
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「Agent Skill、Harness、工具调用和自动化研发」。原文摘要显示：Lowest cost per token from extreme codesign maximizes intelligence per dollar for post-training in the agentic era.

items.title: SUFLECA: Scaling Up Feature Learning for CAD-to-image Alignment
items.summary: CAD-to-image alignment aims to estimate an object's 9D pose (rotation, translation, and anisotropic scale) from a single RGB image, enabling applications in robotics and augmented reality. Recent zero-shot methods use visual foundation models to match image regions to CAD models…
